prompt: Use backend_python_engineer.md, code_reviewer.md, architecture_advisor.md go through all the python files (including test files) to make code review and a clean-up in the repo. Validate: 1. Are there any duplications? 2. Is there dead code? 3. Are there redundancies? 4. Is the code stands by the clean-code standards? 5. Are there any security risks, vulns that could arise?
